logo_choice_reason: Single canonical SVG (P_G_Logo_RGB.svg) found in every header. Multi-color self-contained gradient — used as-is in both light and dark contexts. No ambiguity — Round 1 skipped.
palette_anchor_reason: P&G Blue dominant 115/150 vs paper-white. 100× over any other accent. No Round 2 needed.
font_fallback_reason: Site loads Montserrat via Google Fonts; freely licensable. No licensing concern. Round 3 skipped.
slide_emphasis_reason: User selected all categories. Build a comprehensive deck that exercises every slide type — useful as a wide proof for P&G annual report / ESG / brand portfolio decks.
